formulas.name: Location Quotient (LQ)
formulas.formula: (Reg. Emp / Total Reg. Emp) / (Nat. Emp / Total Nat. Emp)

formulas.name: Employment Growth Rate
formulas.formula: (End Emp - Start Emp) / Start Emp x 100

formulas.name: Wage Growth
formulas.formula: (End Wage - Start Wage) / Start Wage x 100
